svg.title: Punchless improvement roadmap
svg.desc: Three phases of improvements: critical bugs, performance, and mobile reliability

g.text: Phase A — critical bugs (fix first, before any new feature)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I fix the salary report active employee bug?')
g.text: Remove is_active filter for past months

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I fix the client-side hourly rate security vulnerability?')
sendPrompt('How do I add soft deletes to prevent historical data loss?')
sendPrompt('How do I add error boundaries to my Next.js dashboard?')

g.text: Phase B — performance (fix before launch / scaling)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I fix the N+1 loop in settings.actions.ts?')
sendPrompt('How do I combine the user and company queries into one?')
g.text: Join users + companies in one select

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I move salary aggregation into a Supabase database view?')
g.text: Move SUM + GROUP BY into DB view

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I inject company_id into JWT claims for RLS?')
sendPrompt('How do I add pagination to the history and salary list views?')
sendPrompt('How do I add signup rate limiting in Supabase?')

g.text: Phase C — mobile reliability (GPS core product)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I cache workshops locally on the mobile app?')
g.text: DB call on every GPS tick

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build an offline queue for attendance events?')
sendPrompt('How do I only call Supabase on real state transitions?')
g.text: Only sync on state change events

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add error handling to the background location task?')
g.text: No error handling in background task
Try/catch + log to store on failure

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I reduce the workshop cache TTL from 2 minutes?')
sendPrompt('How do I move geofence validation server-side?')

svg.text: Click any item to get implementation details
